title: Sunflowey
description: A simple resource pack changing the top of the sunflower texture to a famous flower from Undertale!
body:
# Sunflowey
Currently, replaces every sunflower (including the icon) with Flowey's head, from Undertale.
In the future, you can expect different faces at night, during the day, and improved textures. Soon!

## How to install
- In-game, press escape
- "Options..."
- "Resource Packs..."
- "Open Pack Folder"
- Drag & drop this resource pack into the newly opened folder
- Voilà!

Enjoy :)
